title: How Iran Is Using Drones to Retaliate Against the U.S. and Allies
author: Eric Schmitt, Helene Cooper and Sheera Frenkel
fullText: The Pentagon and Middle Eastern countries say that most of the drones have been intercepted. But some have slipped through and caused damage.
summary: The Pentagon and Middle Eastern countries say that most of the drones have been intercepted. But some have slipped through and caused damage.
